summary: ISS-2328 (moderate, HOL-REDUNDANCY c2 hole 5): Sydney–Perth internal-disagreement arithmetic redundancy. EXP-495 provides two surgical find-replace patches on data/sections.json: P1 strips the second-mention 3,893/460 km scaffold-disagreement sentence from part6 §6.10 STEELMAN-01's 'why it fails' paragraph (existing cross-reference in the very next sentence already routes to §2.9); P2 strips the equivalent 3,893/4,352/460 km sentence from part7 §7.1 body and adds an inline (§2.9 below) reference. §2.9 is confirmed canonical. 4,352 km stays in STEELMAN-01's opening framing (it is the dome's own headline number). §7.1 TLDR is preserved (layman punchline). Part5 §5.0 left verbose per curmudgeon. Both find_text strings verified unique in sections.json. ~25 net words recovered; ISS-2328 closes; no new ISSs raised.
